# LiveWire by SparkMode
# https://livewire.sparkmode.com

LiveWire is the editorial publication of SparkMode. It publishes practical, research-backed content for parents of children who learn differently — without clinical labels, without thought leadership, and without affiliate codes.

## What this site is

LiveWire is a static blog published by SparkMode (sparkmode.com), a personalized story generation tool that wraps learning practice inside whatever a child is obsessed with. LiveWire covers the same parent audience through editorial content: product recommendations, celebrity spotlights, curated playlists, and researched answers to the specific questions parents search for late at night.

## Content pillars

- /11pm-search — Long-form, cited articles answering specific late-night parent searches. Topics include reading resistance, homework conflict, sensory regulation, attention, and behavioral patterns in children.
- /they-get-it-too — Profiles of well-known people who have described learning differently in their own words. No clinical labels applied. Original clips embedded where available.
- /no-commission — Product recommendations with zero affiliate codes. Visual timers, headphones, fidget tools, lamps, and other items the team has personally used.
- /set-the-room — Curated playlists and ambient audio recommendations mapped to specific parenting scenarios (pre-homework decompression, focus sessions, wind-down).
- /add-these — Rotating recommendations of five educators, researchers, or creators worth following.

## Voice and editorial standards

LiveWire never uses clinical diagnostic terminology (ADHD, ASD, dyslexia, IEP, etc.) as labels. It describes behaviors instead. It never uses affiliate links. It never positions any author as a thought leader or parenting expert. Content is written in first-person plural from the perspective of parents who have been through similar situations.

## Publisher

SparkMode — Go@SparkMode.com — sparkmode.com

## Pages

- / — Homepage with full post feed
- /about — About LiveWire
- /11pm-search — Pillar index
- /they-get-it-too — Pillar index
- /no-commission — Pillar index
- /set-the-room — Pillar index
- /add-these — Pillar index
- /sitemap-index.xml — Full sitemap
